name: kiki-recorder
description: Privacy-first cross-platform desktop screen recorder with annotations, webcam overlay, scheduling, local library, and FFmpeg exports.
author: KikiRecorder Contributors

scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist/main/index.js dist/preload/index.js && node scripts/start-electron-dev.cjs"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: KikiRecorder uses the camera only when webcam recording or webcam overlay is enabled.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: KikiRecorder uses the microphone only when microphone audio is enabled.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: KikiRecorder needs screen capture permission to record your display.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: KikiRecorder can capture system audio when you enable it.
